hypothesis: Replacing the current CATS-based pharmacophore term with a conformer-ensemble 3D pharmacophore/shape overlap score (e.g., USRCAT/Shaper) whose reward weight is linearly annealed during RL training will increase, by at least 30% relative to Setup 4, the fraction of generated ERα molecules with docking scores ≤ −7.0 while maintaining ≥95% novelty versus ChEMBL/ZINC/PubChem.
